Careers

Let’s unlock financial freedom for everyone

Join the fast-moving team that’s building the next era of financial services.

See open roles

  • 150M+ global users

    Securely connecting their financial accounts

  • 1M new daily connections

    Across thousands of apps powered by Plaid

Benefits that you actually want

  • Vibrant offices in SF, NYC, and Raleigh-Durham—with catered meals, happy hours, and clubs to keep you connected

  • Competitive pay, comprehensive health benefits, and support for fertility, mental health, and parental leave

  • Lifestyle perks including home office stipends, daycare support, and commuting benefits like CitiBike and Lyft

Launch Your Career with Plaid

Our software engineering internship program is a chance to learn, grow, and make meaningful contributions while working alongside passionate teammates. You’ll gain hands-on experience, build lasting connections, and get an inside look at what it's like to be part of a company shaping the future of finance.

Learn more and apply here

Hiring in

Our principles

Be part of something big

We’re building a financial system that works for everyone

From loan approvals to real-time insights, meet the people making financial services easier, fairer, and accessible.

Meet Jack, AI Operations

“We are a late-stage company, but we still operate like a start-up. If someone has a really cool idea and they want to break something, we can turn it off tomorrow, build something, and ship it within a few days."

Watch the interview

Meet Sam, Senior Engineering Manager, Core Services

"It's big, it's ambitious, and it's exactly the kind of challenge I'm up to."

Watch the interview

Meet Tommy, Engineering Manager, Payments

"Three words I would use to describe Plaid are: autonomy, supportive, and high impact."

Watch the interview

Meet Anna, New Business Representative

"What excites me most about Plaid's future is the openness our leadership team has to trying new things."
